decisions.decision: Fixed the two open audit findings (AUDIT-F1 Cowork absent from the surface model; AUDIT-F2 the ENAMETOOLONG raw-traceback class) AND the six audit-methodology root causes that let them survive (RC1 circular oracle, RC2 vocabulary fragmentation, RC3 own-runtime blindness, RC4 test-input realism, RC5 narrow fix/narrow guard, RC6 no completeness critic), each closed by a machine-enforced mechanism (ADR 0047). (1) Cowork is modeled as TWO first-class surfaces, cowork_local (VM on the user's machine: Class A/B/C native, flags enforced, local_fs available) and cowork_remote (ephemeral Anthropic-hosted sandbox destroyed at session end: Class B/C via remote MCP only, flags not enforced, no local_fs store), each with vendor-cited field values and needs_verification entries where the docs are silent; five mirror sites (transitions.json, TRANSITION_SURFACE_KEYS, TRANSITIONS.md, wizard _SURFACES, cross-modality-engine matrix) moved in one commit, plus the INJECTION-TWO-PASS row split and a DEPLOYMENT capability-matrix Cowork column. (2) Origin coverage: every surface row carries an origins field and NEW invariant 55 (check_surface_origin_completeness, fail-closed) reconciles queue.py ALLOWED_ORIGINS == the compute-job schema enum AND requires every origin claimed by a surface or the documented _residual_origin_note; negative tests fired verbatim on cowork-unclaimed and a fake enum value. (3) Whole-path hardening: every filesystem touch reachable from a CLI arg in finance/obligations plus the accounts/tasks/doctemplates soft sites (and a bonus taint-scan find: the payload-derived invoice-filename write) returns the clean error envelope on a >255-byte path; invariant 54 widened IN PLACE to loader-body targets + an AST taint layer over main/_main that failed on the pre-fix tree naming the exact sites; every path-taking CLI selftest gained a >NAME_MAX boundary case; two lying summary literals replaced with derived counts. (4) docs/AUDIT-PROTOCOL.md pins the methodology: coverage sets DERIVED from the machine-checked model, four input-boundary classes, per-surface empathy legs, harness honesty, and the mandatory closing unexercised-list; scenario S10 gained the cowork-surface-model leg so the battery executes the Cowork model facts on every run. Invariants 54 to 55; selftests: finance 105/105, obligations 20/20 (derived), accounts 28/28, tasks 46/46 (derived), doctemplates 27/27; scenarios 10/10.
alternatives_rejected: full capability rows for the mac/other origins (fabrication; mac is the local runner already served by claude_desktop/claude_code, other is a forward-compatibility residual -- both claimed via the origins field + residual note instead)
a new invariant number for the widened payload check (widening 54 in place keeps one-invariant-one-guarantee; a separate number would imply the old narrow guarantee still stands)
one merged cowork row (the local and remote modes genuinely diverge on every field the model exists to capture: flag enforcement, local_fs, stdio MCP, machine requirement)

decisions.decision: Remediated all fifteen findings of the P65 full-system audit under three approved defaults: security-first sequencing (the three HIGH data-boundary gaps plus the invariant-36 keystone shipped first), instances-plus-targeted-assertions for the guards (every verified concrete instance fixed; the designed-but-unverified invariant 14/16/17 substring recipes documented as a deliberate backlog in docs/DOC-MAINTENANCE.md rather than deep-rebuilt, to avoid a false-positive storm), and broaden-regex-plus-all-file-sniff for the secret scanner (no entropy tier this phase; the broadened sk- pattern, github_pat_, and the binary-sniff all-file scan closed the three verified bypasses with a clean full-repo false-positive pass). Structural additions: invariant 54 Layer 3 (sixteen thin-main OSError boundaries), invariant 55 affinity table + explicit _residual_origins, invariant 15 def-prose envelope enforcement, NEW advisory invariant 56 (registry _content_digest via registry_io.save_registry, count 55 to 56), the CI behavioral battery (tools/selftest_sweep.py scripted discovery plus scenario_check/count_truth/doc_freshness), derived selftest counts tree-wide, and injection/PII screening on the competitor export. Alternatives rejected: entropy-based secret scanning (tuning risk exceeds benefit while the placeholder allowlist and DEV-TRAP convention hold), a dedicated surface per origin (the origin-to-surface model is many-to-one by design), and immediate property-level rebuilds of invariants 14/16/17 (deferred with drafted fixes). Every fix is proven by a repro that failed on the pre-fix tree; the P65 deliverable in the session scratchpad is the evidence base.
